processing.text:
create table #r(ma_nv varchar(32), ten nvarchar(512), stt_rec_nv char(13), ten_bp nvarchar(512), ten_vt nvarchar(512), diem decimal(10, 5), xep_loai char(2), ten_loai nvarchar(512), dat_yn bit, chung_chi nvarchar(128), ngay_cap smalldatetime, ngay_hl smalldatetime, ngay_hh smalldatetime, ghi_chu nvarchar(128), stt int)
insert into #r(ma_nv, ten, stt_rec_nv, ten_bp, ten_vt, diem, xep_loai, ten_loai, dat_yn, chung_chi, ngay_cap, ngay_hl, ngay_hh, ghi_chu, stt) select a.ma_nv, b.ten, b.stt_rec, b.ten_bp%l, b.ten_vtr%l, a.diem, a.xep_loai, c.ten_loai%l, a.dat_yn, a.chung_chi, a.ngay_cap, a.ngay_hl, a.ngay_hh, a.ghi_chu, a.stt from @@table a left join vhrnv b on a.ma_nv = b.ma_nv left join hrdmxldt c on a.xep_loai = c.ma_loai
select '' as message, 'this.frameElement.result = @@result;parent.set$Grid$ImportResult(this.frameElement);' as script select ma_nv, ten, stt_rec_nv, ten_bp, ten_vt, diem, xep_loai, ten_loai, dat_yn, chung_chi, ngay_cap, ngay_hl, ngay_hh, ghi_chu from #r order by stt return
